title: README: better first glance idea
body:
Fixes #347

Make the project's first-glance easier to digest.

Signed-off-by: Vincent Batts <vbatts@hashbangbash.com>

comments.body: FWIW, build error is a flake, couldn't talk to Fedora's registry.
would like this merged before kubecon gets fully underway today :-)
@nalind OK to merge?  Build issues are not related.
@TomSweeneyRedHat Yeah, it reads fine to me.  I'm going to have to bypass the merge bot.
